features.title: Per-sector ratio aliases + 重跑 backfill 补 6 ticker (B029 Soft-watch S1 解决)
features.acceptance: (1) 改 workbench_api/data/xbrl_parser.py：新增 SEC_CONCEPT_ALIASES_PER_SECTOR: dict[str, dict[str, list[str]]] 覆盖 Financials / Utilities / Real Estate 3 sector 每个含 8 ratio 涉及 concept 的 alias chain；新增 get_concept_alias_chain(ticker, concept, sector) helper；改 compute_ratios 接收 sector 参数 + 用 alias chain fallback；(2) 改 workbench_api/data/sec_edgar_loader.py：fetch_quarterly_fundamentals 接收 sector 参数 (来自 universe_us_quality.py 查表) + 传到 xbrl_parser.compute_ratios；(3) 改 scripts/universe_us_quality.py：每 ticker 加 sector 字段 (与 B025 fixture universe.csv 的 gics_sector 列一致)；(4) **重跑 backfill**: python scripts/backfill_fundamentals.py --from 2014-01-01 --to 2026-05-26 --universe us_quality；产物 27 CIK 目录 (既有) + 6 sector ticker (BAC/JPM/V/LIN/NEE/PLD) 现在写真实 parsed_ratios.json 不再 0-row；unified.fundamentals.csv 行数从 685 → **≥1000** (spec floor 达成；27 真 ticker × 40 quarter)；(5) 跑 cross-check：抽 6 sector ticker × 5 fiscal_quarter 验证 8 ratio 全非 zero/NaN + 数值合理范围；(6) 更新 docs/test-reports/B030-pit-validation-2026-MM-DD.md (B029 PIT validation 基础上加 6 sector 补 backfill 后新行)；(7) pytest ≥10 测试：SEC_CONCEPT_ALIASES_PER_SECTOR 3 sector × 8 ratio / get_concept_alias_chain 一般 sector default / Financials → InterestAndDividendIncomeOperating / mock XBRL 4 sector ratio happy path / universe_us_quality 30 ticker 含 sector / 重跑后 6 sector ticker row > 0 / alias chain fallback；(8) Gates: pytest tests ≥361 baseline (B029) + ≥10 = ≥371 / ruff + mypy 清 / frontend 不破 vitest ≥166 / 本机重跑 backfill 数据本机存在 / docs/test-reports/B030-pit-validation 报告通过；(9) 不动 B027/B028 既有 loader / scripts / B025 fixture / strategy 代码 (留 F002) / B026 banner (留 F003) / production deploy (F001 本机)。

features.title: Master Portfolio 4 sleeve + B025 us_quality 5 因子 strategy 代码切真
features.acceptance: (1) 改 trade/strategies/momentum.py：直接 pd.read_csv → load_prices(tickers, as_of_date)；(2) 改 trade/strategies/risk_parity.py：同上；(3) 改 trade/strategies/us_quality_momentum/factors.py + signal.py：8 ratio 计算 from load_fundamentals + price-derived ratio 从 load_prices；signal.py pipeline 用 loader-injected 数据；(4) 改 trade/strategies/hk_china_proxy.py (若已实现 stub)：load_prices unified；(5) 改 trade/portfolio/master.py：Master Portfolio 4 sleeve 组合切到 unified prices via load_prices + as_of_date 透传；(6) **不动 trade/data/loader.py 现有逻辑** (B028 F003 + B029 F003 已就位 unified-first + fixture fallback；本 F002 仅改 strategy 消费方)；(7) pytest ≥20 测试：每 sleeve unified 路径读 PriceBar / FundamentalsRow 成功 / unified 缺数据 fall back fixture / B025 us_quality 5 因子在 unified 数据下 ratio 与 fixture 路径数值差异 ±10% 容忍 / Master Portfolio 4 sleeve 组合 unified-first 完整跑通 / 既有 B011 / B025 / B013 strategy 测试 100% 通过；(8) 重要: **B025 us_quality_momentum 既有回测在 fixture path 数字不变** — FORCE_FIXTURE_PATH=1 env var 强制 fixture 路径时既有 deterministic 测试 100% 通过 (保 B025 acceptance §F003 §(4))；(9) Gates: pytest tests ≥371 + ≥20 = ≥391 / ruff + mypy 清 / FORCE_FIXTURE_PATH=1 pytest 强制 fixture 路径全过 / 默认 (unified-first) 全过 / frontend 不破；(10) 不动 trade/data/loader.py / workbench backend endpoints / Frontend UI / B026 banner (留 F003) / reports/ (留 F003)。

features.title: Fixture-vs-real 对比报告 + B026 banner 关闭 (v0.9.30 §12.9 4 处接线)
features.acceptance: (1) 新建 scripts/compare_fixture_vs_real.py：对每 sleeve (Master + momentum + risk_parity + us_quality + hk_china_proxy 共 5 个) 跑两次 backtest (FORCE_FIXTURE_PATH=1 vs default)；输出并排对比表 (Annual Return / Volatility / Sharpe / Sortino / Calmar / MDD / Turnover / Win Rate)；写 .md + .json 到 reports/fixture_vs_real/<sleeve>_2026-MM-DD.{md,json}；overview 总结 reports/fixture_vs_real/overview_2026-MM-DD.md；(2) **本批次跑 compare_fixture_vs_real.py**：5 份对比报告 + 1 overview 入 reports/fixture_vs_real/ (commit message + signoff 记录)；(3) **B026 banner 关闭 (v0.9.30 §12.9 4 处接线遵守)**：workbench/frontend/.env.example 保留 NEXT_PUBLIC_SYNTHETIC_DATA_BANNER=true 注释 (本机 dev default enable) / workbench/frontend/.env.production 加 NEXT_PUBLIC_SYNTHETIC_DATA_BANNER=false / .github/workflows/bootstrap-env.yml 加一行 inject NEXT_PUBLIC_SYNTHETIC_DATA_BANNER=false 到 production frontend env file；frontend redeploy 后 production HTML/JS bundle 不含 banner DOM；(4) 不动 B026 既有 banner 组件代码 SyntheticDataBanner.tsx (保 Layer 0 重启路径)；(5) pytest ≥10 测试：compare_fixture_vs_real.py 5 sleeve 对比表 schema correct / fixture vs real Δ 合理范围 / NEXT_PUBLIC_SYNTHETIC_DATA_BANNER=false 时 component returns null / bootstrap-env.yml 含 NEXT_PUBLIC_SYNTHETIC_DATA_BANNER 行 / .env.production 含 false / .env.example 保留 true 注释；(6) Gates: pytest tests ≥391 + ≥10 = ≥401 / frontend vitest ≥166 不破 + Playwright ≥38 不破 / ruff + mypy 清 / npm run build 成功生成 production bundle / 5 份 + 1 overview 对比报告本机存在 / bootstrap-env.yml grep 守门 v0.9.30 §12.9；(7) 不动 strategy 代码 (F002 已切完) / trade/data/loader.py / B026 banner 组件代码 / workbench backend endpoints。

features.title: Codex L1 + L2 真 VM 验收 + signoff = 里程碑 A Layer 0→1
features.acceptance: L1 (CI 内): F001-F003 全 generator 验收脚本跑通 — backend / trade pytest ≥401 / ruff / mypy / alembic up-down OK；Frontend vitest ≥166 (含至少 1 个 banner=false 渲染测试) + Playwright ≥38 + build OK；safety regression 全绿 (含 v0.9.29 §12.8.1 + **v0.9.30 §12.9 bootstrap-env.yml grep 守门**)；artifact grep 无 secret 泄漏；**FORCE_FIXTURE_PATH=1 pytest tests 强制 fixture 路径全过 (保既有 deterministic)**。L2 (真 VM): (1) Frontend redeploy 触发 (workbench-frontend.yml paths 含 .env.production 改动自然触 frontend CI → Workbench Deploy)；production VM 拿到新 frontend bundle (NEXT_PUBLIC_SYNTHETIC_DATA_BANNER=false build-time inject)；(2) curl https://trade.guangai.ai/api/health 200 + version SHA 与 main HEAD 等价；(3) curl https://trade.guangai.ai/api/debug/recent-errors 返回 {"count":0,"records":[]}；(4) **B026 banner 已下线**：浏览器访问 /strategies / /reports / etc 看不到 banner DOM；HTML grep 不命中 '研究原型 · 仅含合成数据'；(5) **Recommendations / Reports / Backtest 页面展示真实数据指标** (VM 上拉 production / api 数据，看 sleeve breakdown / NAV / target positions 数字)；(6) **5 份 + 1 overview fixture vs real 对比报告本机存在且可读** (reports/fixture_vs_real/)；(7) Production HEAD ≡ main HEAD (v0.9.25 §Production/HEAD 等价性) + Post-signoff Deploy 段 (v0.9.27 / §12.7.1 / §12.9)。Signoff: docs/test-reports/B030-real-data-cutover-signoff-2026-MM-DD.md 用 framework/templates/signoff-report.md；**🎯 Signoff 明示 '里程碑 A Layer 0→1 达成'**：含 fixture vs real 对比 5 报告链接 + production banner 已关 + 5 sleeve real 数据回测指标 summary；docs/screenshots/B030-cutover/ ≥5 PNG (production 无 banner + fixture vs real overview + 各 sleeve real 数据指标)。Framework 候选：预期无重大；若 fix-round 出现 strategy 切真后某 sleeve 指标爆炸 / unified.csv 与 strategy 假设不一致 / fall back 逻辑失效记录 signoff §Framework Learnings。更新 progress.json status→done / docs.signoff / evaluator_feedback。
